commands: say §b💀 {sender} เสก Skeleton มาโจมตี!
execute at @p run summon skeleton ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"§4§l{sender}",CustomNameVisible:1b,PersistenceRequired:1b}
execute as @e[type=skeleton,tag=gangster,limit=1,sort=nearest] at @s run damage @s 0 minecraft:generic by @e[type=!player,team=green,limit=1,sort=nearest,distance=..50]
tag @e[tag=gangster] remove gangster
execute at @p run playsound block.note_block.bell master @a
say §b❄️ {sender} เรียก Snow Golem มาปกป้อง!
execute at @p run summon snow_golem ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"§2§l{sender}",CustomNameVisible:1b,PersistenceRequired:1b}
execute at @p run playsound entity.enderman.teleport master @a
say §b💎 {sender} ได้ให้เพชรจำนวน x1!
give @p diamond 1
execute at @p run playsound entity.player.levelup master @a
say §c🧟 {sender} เสก Zombie มาโจมตี!
execute at @p run summon zombie ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"§4§l{sender}",CustomNameVisible:1b,PersistenceRequired:1b}
execute at @p run playsound block.note_block.bell master @a
say §e⚡ {sender} ได้ให้บัฟพลังความเร็วแสง!
effect give @p speed 30 2 true
effect give @p jump_boost 30 2 true
effect give @p glowing 30 1 true
execute at @p run playsound entity.player.levelup master @a

execute at @p run playsound entity.player.levelup master @a
say §b🐶 {sender} เสกลูกหมาแสนรู้!
execute as @p at @s run summon wolf ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"§b§l{sender}",CustomNameVisible:1b,PersistenceRequired:1b,Tags:["tame_me"],Age:-24000}
execute as @p run data modify entity @e[type=wolf,tag=tame_me,limit=1,sort=nearest] Owner set from entity @s UUID
tag @e[type=wolf,tag=tame_me,limit=1,sort=nearest] remove tame_me
execute at @p run playsound block.note_block.bell master @a
say §5🎲 {sender} เรียก Air Drop เสี่ยงโชค! (มาลุ้นกันว่าข้างในมีอะไร?)

execute at @p run summon chicken ~ ~30 ~ {PersistenceRequired:1b,Passengers:[{id:"minecraft:chest_minecart",CustomName:"§5§lMystery Drop",CustomNameVisible:1b,LootTable:"minecraft:chests/end_city_treasure"}]}
execute at @p run playsound entity.firework_rocket.launch master @a
Paper Crane.description: Air Drop เสี่ยงโชค!

commands: say §7🪓 {sender} เรียก Iron Golem มาปกป้อง!
execute at @p run summon iron_golem ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"§2§l{sender}",CustomNameVisible:1b,PersistenceRequired:1b}
execute at @p run playsound entity.enderman.teleport master @a
